title: Baby Laughter as Pure Depth Transition Detector

analysis.object: T630: Baby Laughter as Pure Depth Transition Detector depth analysis

pre_linguistic.description: Babies operate at EML-0/1: no language, no EML-2 measurement overlay
pre_linguistic.reason: Pre-linguistic baby: EML-0 discrete sensation and EML-1 exponential pleasure/discomfort

pure_delta_d.description: Baby laughter: pure Deltad detector uncorrupted by EML-2 or EML-3 reasoning
pure_delta_d.reason: Baby laughter is the purest depth-transition signal: Deltad fires without conceptual filtering

cleanest_window.description: Baby laughter is the cleanest window into depth hierarchy: pre-linguistic, unfiltered
cleanest_window.reason: Theorem: baby laughter is more fundamental depth signal than adult laughter; pure categorification detector

analysis.theorem: T630: Baby Laughter as Pure Depth Transition Detector (S909).

key_theorem: T630: Baby Laughter as Pure Depth Transition Detector (S909).
